title: Ubiquiti UOC-0.5 - Unifi ODN Cable, 0.5 Meter
category: Ubiquiti UOC-0.5 - Unifi ODN Cable, 0.5 Meter
description: Ubiquiti UOC-0.5 optical patch cord is suitable for connecting active and passive optical elements. Cable is made as multimode with 50/125 (OM3) fibers, 2mm diameter, 0,5m length and LC-LC duplex connectors
